# terrible_lowlydba_sqlserver_install_script (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `database` (String) Name of the target database.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `path` (String) Directory where targeted sql scripts are stored.

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `connection_timeout` (Number) Database server connection timeout in seconds. Only affects connection attempts. Does not affect execution timeout.
- `create_database` (Boolean) Will create an empty database if missing.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `deployment_method` (String) `SingleTransaction` - wrap all the deployment scripts into a single transaction and rollback whole deployment on error. `TransactionPerScript` - wrap each script into a separate transaction; rollback single script deployment in case of error. `NoTransaction` - deploy as is. `AlwaysRollback` - roll back the transaction.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `execution_timeout` (Number) Script execution timeout. The script will be aborted if the execution takes more than specified number of seconds.
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `match` (String) Runs a regex verification against provided file names using the provided string.
- `no_log_version` (Boolean) If set, the deployment will not be tracked in the database. That will also mean that all the scripts and all the builds from the package are going to be deployed regardless of any previous deployment history.
- `no_recurse` (Boolean) Only process the first level of the target path.
- `output_file` (String) Log output into specified file.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `schema_version_table` (String) A table that will hold the history of script execution. This table is used to choose what scripts are going to be run during the deployment, preventing the scripts from being execured twice.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `data` (String) Modified output from the `Install-DboScript` function.
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
